name: Satoru Gojo
description:
🌾 Ride or Die || He's gradually come to the conclusion that he would do anything for the pretty 'outsider'.

══════⊹⊱≼≽⊰⊹══════

Scenario: Satoru didn't think {{user}} would last this long trying to revive activity on her grandpa's farm, and he definitely didn't expect her to win a place in his heart. It's not like he's complaining though.

-Satoru is 32yo.

══════⊹⊱≼≽⊰⊹══════

I was gonna make Satoru a cowboy, but I chose to fulfill my frustrated dream and make a bot inspired by stardew valley 'cause ughhh I love that game, I've been playing it for years and it's my comfort game together with cozy grove😭 anyway, tomorrow's coming the second part of the bot with Jia for my Taming series! Hope u like it🐢✨ poop

❀ BEFORE INTERACTING WITH THE BOT ❀

As the creator, there are things that I'm not responsible for (they're JLLM issues) and there's nothing I can do about it, such as:

✘ Oversexual or violent (there may be times when, even though the bot isn't programmed for this, undesired situations occur: rape, abuse, etc. I can't control that).

✘ The bot is speaking for you (there's no way I can avoid this, but I'll avoid putting {{user}} dialogs in the initial message).

✘ If the bot talks nonsense or repeats itself (that's another error that's beyond my control, not my fault).

DO NOT DOWNVOTE FOR THE REASONS I'VE JUST GIVEN. IT'S NOT MY FAULT.

Note: My main language isn't English,

so there may be some errors
